projectDescription: An AI-powered hotel complaint intelligence management system that classifies guest reviews, routes tickets to departments, validates proof images, and provides operational analytics.
keyFeatures: AI-based complaint vs appreciation detection using sentence embeddings and cosine similarity
Automatic department routing for Housekeeping, Engineering & Maintenance, Food & Beverage, IT Support, and Front Office
AI-generated image detection for proof validation using the Nonescape model
Multilingual voice input and UI translation via Sarvam AI (22+ Indian languages)
Admin dashboard with CSV upload, ticket management, staff accounts, and analytics
Department staff dashboard for viewing and resolving assigned tickets with proof
Supabase authentication, row-level security, and storage
Dark mode support and date-filtered analytics with Recharts
MLflow and DVC integration for ML experiment tracking
publicApiSurface: POST /predict_batch — Batch review classification from CSV
POST /create_staff — Admin: create department staff account
POST /translate/texts — Translate text via Sarvam AI
POST /complaints/{complaint_id}/resolve_with_proof — Resolve ticket with proof image
